content.text: Всё на месте. Discussion смягчён, Popper убран, Limitations честный без скрытых claims, Conclusion использует "tracks" вместо "determined by". Основной текст заканчивается на стр. 9 — в лимите. Коммичу.

content.name: Bash
content.input:
[object Object]{"command": "cd /Users/krestnikov/giga/compression-drives-truth && git add paper_neurips/main.tex paper_neurips/main.pdf paper_neurips/references.bib scripts/reproduce_minimal.sh scripts/run_wiki_experiment.sh requirements.txt pyproject.toml && git add -f paper_neurips/main.pdf && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Address reviewer 3: fix checklist, gzip table, scripts, soften overclaims

Critical fixes:
- Fix checklist: "binomial test" → "Wilcoxon signed-rank test" (matches code)
- Add 3 missing rows to gzip table (N=3, world random/coherent) — now 9 conditions
- Fix reproduce_minimal.sh: --correct-ratio→--ratio, --error-type→--error-mode
- Fix run_wiki_experiment.sh: match actual CLI of train.py and eval_paired.py
- Fix requirements.txt: add sentencepiece, huggingface_hub, document optional deps
- Fix pyproject.toml: requires-python >=3.10 (was >=3.14), add real dependencies

Text improvements:
- Soften abstract: "consistent with" not "support", remove "sharp"
- Soften intro: remove RLHF, "In our task families" not absolute claims
- Soften discussion: "provides strong evidence" not "rules out"
- Soften conclusion: "tracks" not "determined by"
- Remove Popper analogy from discussion (and .bib)
- Fix limitations: remove hidden MDL claim, call 1B "sanity check"
- Fix frequency claim: "dominates" not "alone determines"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"", "description": "Commit all reviewer 3 fixes"}
